questionHtml:
What is the main role of carbon dioxide in the greenhouse effect?

A. It absorbs incoming radiation from the Sun.

B. It absorbs outgoing radiation from the Earth.

C. It reflects incoming radiation from the Sun.

D. It reflects outgoing radiation from the Earth.

meta.title: What is the main role of carbon dioxide in the greenhouse effect? A. It absorbs incoming radiation from the Sun. B. It absorbs outgoing radiation from the Earth. C. It reflects inc
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
